text:
The Sengi Guild Agent also known as Rei (レイ, Rei) is an employment agent working in the underground Sengi Guild which hires new and old Hunters for various jobs. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 6, Chapter 51 

Appearance

The agent is relatively tall and gaunt and has purple hair, combed to the left, most likely with hair gel. She has many piercings on her nose, lips, ears, and eyebrows. She also has multiple tattoos, rings on her fingers, metallic wristbands, and wears very little makeup, but nail polish.

Personality

The agent keeps a calm, professional, and informative demeanor. She takes her job seriously, as she refused to allow Kurapika to pass when he couldn't see her Hatsu. 

Plot

Heavens Arena arc

 to Kurapika]]

Kurapika finds the agent in her building, seeking a Hunter job, but she instantly denies him. She praises him for finding the guild and can tell that he's smart, but adds that it's not enough for her to refer him to important clients. While Kurapika did pass the Hunter Exam, the agent reveals that it isn't over yet. She then asks if he can see the thing next to her, but Kurapika is left confused. She tells him to return when he can since it's the agency's minimum requirement. 

Yorknew City arc

Kurapika returns to the guild close to six months later and proves that he has learned Nen. The agent praises him for not only learning Nen, but also for how quickly he learned it. When she asks what sort of job he's looking for, Kurapika responds that he wants someone with strong connections to the Underground Auction in Yorknew City, adding that he doesn't care what kind of job it is. The agent informs him that clients with power usually have high criteria and doubts that they will hire someone with zero experience as a Hunter. Still, she nevertheless searches on her computer to find any results. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 67 

She finds three job offers to match Kurapika's request, all of which will be hired based on an interview and include personal protection. She then describes each of the employers:

A handgun buff seeking the Misette Limited Edition Bull Snake: Model S55, No. 001.
An antiques collector seeking Rodo Memorial Plates from 1655 and 1657.
Finally, a flesh/body-part collector seeking, among other things, a mint-condition hide with a full-body tattoo of a rising dragon and the head of a child with jelly syndrome.

After commenting on how the flesh collector has a nasty hobby, she asks Kurapika which of the three offers he wants to take. 

Abilities & Powers

As a staff member of the Sengi Guild, the agent has access to difficult-to-find information, which gives her insight into the underground world.

Nen

She has displayed some skills in Nen, having transmuted her aura into a skull-like face. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the manga or anime adaptations.
The agent has been referred to as 斡旋所 所員 Hunter × Hunter: Battle Collection (Assen-sho Shoin * , literally "Recruitment Office Staff Member" or "Placement Staff" * ) in the Hunter × Hunter Battle Collection card game.
In the video game Each One's Determination, she is given the name レイ Hunter × Hunter: Each One's Determination (Rei). 
For the Jump Characters Store exclusive All Stars tin badge set, she has been referred to as 斡旋所の女性 Jump Characters Store 2023 All Stars Tin Badge Set of 100 (Assen-sho no Josei * , literally "Woman at the Recruitment Office" * )
The agent's knowledge that Kurapika had not finished the Secret Hunter Exam yet suggests that she is a Hunter, too. Alternatively, the deduction could also easily be due to her long experience working with Hunters.
